title: The Patriot's Bed (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
When a son you shall desire,
        Pray to water and to fire;
        But when you would have a daughter,
        Pray to fire and then to water.
meaning:
This evocative piece by James Stephens, titled "The Patriot's Bed (The Rocky Road To Dublin)", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
